title: Planned power outage: 5th Avenue, Denneoord
description: GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power outage for a portion of 5th Avenue in Denneoord on Wednesday 20 March from 09:00 to 16:30 for alterations to the electrical mains.


> Consumers are warned to treat the installation as being live for the full duration as the supply may be resumed at any time within the notified period.


Should circumstances prevent the work being carried out during the abovementioned period; the work will be done on Wednesday 27 March from 09:00 to 16:30.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
